market_validation_signal: Free trial to paid conversion jumped from 18% to 32% after onboarding email rewrite.
founder_action: Roll out the revised onboarding sequence to all new signups; track 30-day retention impact.
risk_flag: Improvement may be seasonal; confirm trend sustains over 2–3 months.

market_validation_signal: Waitlist hit 500 signups organically via niche subreddit post.
founder_action: Engage the community directly to deepen demand before opening access.
risk_flag: Community culture misalignment could lead to early churn.

market_validation_signal: Pilot feature usage exceeded expectations with avg. 4.5 daily sessions per user.
founder_action: Prioritise scaling backend to handle projected 5× load.
risk_flag: High engagement may drop if novelty wears off.

market_validation_signal: Customer interviews revealed three pain points not addressed in current roadmap.
founder_action: Re-order roadmap to address top-ranked pain point within two sprints.
risk_flag: Scope creep risk; avoid diluting core focus.

market_validation_signal: Test ads with rough mockup achieved 5% CTR vs 1.2% industry average.
founder_action: Build MVP landing page to capture leads immediately.
risk_flag: Mockup expectations may outpace actual MVP capabilities.

scrappy_tactic: Founder delivers surprise thank-you packages to top 10 customers.
scalability_limit: Manual curation caps at 15 customers per week.
growth_trigger: Automate gifting once churn in top segment drops below 2%.

scrappy_tactic: Manually tags and segments every new customer in CRM by founder’s hand.
scalability_limit: 10 minutes per user max before it blocks other priorities.
growth_trigger: Automate tagging when segment definitions stabilise.

scrappy_tactic: Founder answers every inbound support ticket personally in first month.
scalability_limit: Max 50 tickets per day before slowing response times.
growth_trigger: Document top 20 answers into help centre before handoff.

scrappy_tactic: Organises in-person meetups for first 25 customers.
scalability_limit: Venue and travel costs unsustainable past three events.

scrappy_tactic: Personally walks customers through competitor migration process.
scalability_limit: Complexity rises past 10 migrations per month.
growth_trigger: Record walkthrough video after 15 successful migrations.

MVP_definition: Ship only the single core job: capture request, process, and deliver result via email.
blocker_removal: Defer SSO providers to post-launch; use passwordless magic links; push advanced analytics to backlog.
time_to_market_metric: Target first live user within 10 days; MVP code freeze at day 7.

MVP_definition: Clickable prototype with one working flow for top persona.
blocker_removal: Replace custom billing with Stripe payment links; stub non-critical integrations.
time_to_market_metric: Demo to five prospects in one week; collect same-day feedback.

MVP_definition: Command-line tool exported as a simple web form with no auth.
blocker_removal: Skip branding and dashboard; log outputs to secure sheet.

MVP_definition: Single feature that solves the most frequent pain point end-to-end.
blocker_removal: Cut mobile app; ship responsive web only; avoid native SDK work.
time_to_market_metric: Cut scope until build fits in one sprint with zero dependencies.

MVP_definition: Manual backend with automated front-door UI.
blocker_removal: Use no-code ops for fulfillment; instrument only one KPI.
time_to_market_metric: Launch in five working days; daily ship cadence.

runway_calc: 12 months runway post recent funding; burn stable.
cost_control: Negotiate annual vendor contracts at discounted rates.
revenue_path: Introduce small-team pricing tier to capture emerging startups.

runway_calc: 5 months runway; new deal in negotiation may add three months.
revenue_path: Offer paid pilot extensions to existing enterprise clients.

runway_calc: 8 months runway at $50K burn; pipeline could extend by six months.
cost_control: Switch analytics provider to save $12K per year.
revenue_path: Launch referral program with discounted annual plans.

runway_calc: 3 months runway; high churn threatening cash flow.
revenue_path: Aggressively upsell to top 20% most engaged users.

cost_control: Consolidate SaaS tools to remove redundancy.
revenue_path: Beta-launch enterprise API for higher MRR.

constraint_hack: Used free credits from cloud startup program to delay infra spend.
obstacle_map: Initial infra cost too high for MVP testing.

constraint_hack: Partnered with local college to get interns for data labeling.
next_move: Set up repeat internship program to maintain cost advantage.

constraint_hack: Hacked together CRM using spreadsheet plus free automation tools.
next_move: Replace with custom solution after first 50 customers.

constraint_hack: Repurposed retired laptops for in-house test rigs.
next_move: Expand rig pool as hardware donations arrive.

constraint_hack: Used barter to secure influencer shout-outs without cash outlay.
next_move: Systematise barter deals into monthly pipeline.

impact_metric: Top two features drive 80% of daily active usage.
distraction_flag: Avoid chasing competitor features with <5% demand.

impact_metric: NPS survey identified onboarding as top driver of satisfaction.
priority_shift: Dedicate next sprint to onboarding UX improvements.
distraction_flag: Ignore cosmetic changes until retention stabilises.

impact_metric: Revenue from enterprise clients exceeds SMB by 5×.
priority_shift: Focus BD efforts on enterprise vertical.
distraction_flag: Limit SMB support to templated solutions.

impact_metric: Churn rate improved by 15% from proactive outreach program.
priority_shift: Scale program to cover entire base.
distraction_flag: Avoid building new retention tool until core process is mature.

impact_metric: 90% of feature requests align with one planned module.
priority_shift: Fast-track that module into current sprint.
distraction_flag: Do not fragment dev focus with minor features.

adjacent_opportunity: Regional expansion into under-served APAC countries.
entry_risk: Localization costs may eat early profits.

adjacent_opportunity: Regional expansion into under-served APAC countries.
entry_risk: Localization costs may eat early profits.

market_size: $900M niche with clear path to $4B adjacent.
adjacent_opportunity: Leverage same tech in adjacent insurance market.
Upsell analytics into $2B adjacent martech segment.
entry_risk: SMB churn volatility threatens LTV/CAC ratio.

market_size: $1.2B domestic with regulatory reforms expected in 18–24 months.
adjacent_opportunity: First-mover advantage in compliance automation when rules change.
entry_risk: Timing risk; regulation timeline slippage could stall growth.

focus_index: Allocate 80% of cycles to improving activation-to-value time.
competitor_noise_filter: Decline parity features that don’t improve activation.
core_progress: Activation improved from 22% to 34% in four weeks.

focus_index: Weekly build-measure-learn loop on one core KPI.
competitor_noise_filter: No roadmap items derived from competitor changelogs.
core_progress: Two-week cadence delivering measurable retention lift.

focus_index: Daily founder check-in on user outcomes, not competitor news.
Prototype tests on core workflow friction only.
competitor_noise_filter: Reject vanity integrations without proven demand.

focus_index: Instrument and optimize the aha-moment path.
core_progress: Aha-moment reached by 60% of new users (up from 35%).

early_adopter_profile: Independent fitness coaches with fewer than 50 clients.
tight_loop_feedback: Weekly video calls with top 10 adopters to co-design new features.
niche_scaling_plan: Expand to boutique gyms once retention exceeds 85% in core group.

early_adopter_profile: B2B SaaS founders doing founder-led sales.
tight_loop_feedback: Daily Slack channel with 8 champions for rapid iteration.
niche_scaling_plan: Scale to small sales teams after playbook success.

tight_loop_feedback: Office-hours twice weekly to capture workflow gaps.
niche_scaling_plan: Move to small accounting firms post 90-day retention proof.

early_adopter_profile: D2C founders shipping under 500 orders per month.
tight_loop_feedback: Instrument cohort usage; interview outliers weekly.
niche_scaling_plan: Target micro-brands marketplace after achieving 30% time saved.

early_adopter_profile: Indie mobile game studios with teams of 2–5.
tight_loop_feedback: Biweekly roadmap reviews with three design partners.
niche_scaling_plan: Expand to mid-size studios once SDK stabilises.

user_interview_exemplar: “I export data every Friday and fix it by hand; it takes me two hours.”
pain_point_map: Manual, recurring data cleanup; time cost and error risk.
insight_derivation: Automate the Friday cleanup; success = zero manual steps.

user_interview_exemplar: “I don’t trust the dashboard until I check raw logs.”
pain_point_map: Low trust from mismatched metrics; lack of audit trail.
insight_derivation: Expose drill-down with raw event reconciliation to build trust.

user_interview_exemplar: “I only use it when my boss asks for a report.”
pain_point_map: Tool not embedded in daily workflow; value episodic.
insight_derivation: Push proactive insights into the user’s native tools to create pull.

user_interview_exemplar: “I’m afraid to click run; last time it broke billing.”
pain_point_map: Fear from past negative outcomes; poor safety signaling.
insight_derivation: Add sandbox mode and reversible actions; communicate safeguards.

user_interview_exemplar: “I wish it just told me what changed this week.”
pain_point_map: Cognitive overload; user wants synthesized deltas.
insight_derivation: Weekly change digest; highlight anomalies and recommended actions.
